{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Imperial army
| introduced = ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea
}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Rudeus Maxwell]] served in the [[Imperial army]] for almost ten years.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c3">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
